title: SKOS Datasets for Aligning INSEE Concepts
author: Atemezing Auguste Ghislain
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is the list of datasets used for the alignments of INSEE concepts. 

 The Github repository at https://github.com/MondecaLabs/INSEE-Alignment presents the procedure and the results
